redaction_confirmation: Prompts, files, user identifiers, and sensitive content have been summarized or redacted.

usage_patterns.name: Document Summary Assistant
usage_patterns.business_purpose: Summarize internal documents for staff review.
usage_patterns.approval_expectations: Human approval required before sharing generated summaries.
external_effects: May create or share a document if permissions allow
unknowns: Whether generated summaries inherit source document sharing settings is unknown.
